title: Euro-Office 1.0 arrives to open-source infighting: 'Compatibility is not sovereignty' | ZDNET
description: The new cloud-based, open-source alternative to Microsoft 365 and Google Workspace is here, as LibreOffice backers lambast its reliance on Microsoft document formats.
